description: MANDATORY anti-overlap (pulled-forward roadmap #185): discriminates contract VERIFICATION from contract DESIGN (shipped api-event-architect) and from end-to-end flow testing (integration-test-designer), within the test-level cluster.

cases.prompt: Add CI checks proving our API responses and webhook payloads still match the published schemas and that changes stay backward compatible.
cases.reason: Schema conformance and compatibility gating is contract VERIFICATION — the contract already exists; no flow through internal boundaries is being tested.

cases.prompt: We need a versioning and deprecation policy for our public API plus signed webhook envelopes with replay protection.
cases.reason: That is designing the contract and its policies — the shipped api-event-architect's scope; verification comes after.

cases.prompt: Test that submitting an order updates inventory and writes the audit row through the real services and database.
cases.reason: That is business flow across real internal boundaries — integration; contract testing checks shape/version, not multi-step behavior.

cases.prompt: Prove wrong-tenant callers get denied on every orders endpoint.
cases.reason: WHO gets denied is the authorization negative suite (shipped multi-tenant-security-tester); contract tests only verify the SHAPE of refusals.
